title: Study Tips for Dyslexic Students
text: Studying with dyslexia can be challenging, especially when reading dense textbooks. Break tasks into small steps and use timers. Read with a ruler or screen overlay to reduce visual stress. Ask for accommodations early.

title: Cómo tomar apuntes efectivos
text: Tomar apuntes efectivos ayuda a recordar. Usa títulos claros y listas. Resume cada clase en tres ideas. Revisa tus notas al final del día.

title: Conseils pour la lecture
text: Lire peut être fatigant. Fais des pauses régulières. Utilise des polices adaptées et augmente l'espacement. Demande de l'aide quand tu en as besoin.

title: Time Management for Exams
text: Exams require planning. Start a calendar. Map deadlines. Protect sleep. Keep one page of formulas and keywords for quick review.

title: Ortografía y autocorrección
text: La ortografía mejora con práctica. Prueba herramientas de autocorrección. Lee en voz alta. Pide a un amigo que revise tus textos.

title: Assistive Tech Overview
text: Assistive technology can support reading and writing. Text-to-speech tools read aloud. Spellcheckers catch mistakes. Mind-mapping organizes ideas before writing.

title: Accommodation Request Template
text: Draft: Template letter for requesting accommodations from a school. Replace placeholders. Keep tone polite and clear.

title: Dyscalculia Basics
text: Dyscalculia affects number processing. Use visual aids. Practice with real-world examples. Ask teachers for step-by-step explanations.
